late_recorded_policy.statement: Scorecards exclude late-recorded records by default unless include_late_recorded=true is deliberately supplied.

exporter_jsonl_drain.reason: TraceLab substrate-invariant scoring reads the live SQLite database and B1 dispatch trace; one-inode-per-event JSONL exports are not needed during the 1-2 week run.
exporter_jsonl_drain.operator_instruction: Do not schedule or invoke export.drain during the TraceLab run. If a post-run JSONL artifact is needed, drain once after final backup and analysis.

transcripts.operator_instruction: Keep only the newest 20 transcript/log transcript artifacts per trader agent and never retain TraceLab raw transcripts beyond 14 days unless copied into a separately approved evidence bundle.

dispatch_trace_rotation.operator_instruction: B1 dispatch trace must be rotated by size and retained-file count; these values match dispatch_trace.py defaults and are made explicit for TraceLab launches.

replay_caveat.statement: Coach, mistake-tripwire, calibration-advisory, and other read-rail adoption findings must be captured from the live B1 dispatch trace. JSONL replay/import drops signal.emitted and memory_node.invalidated diagnostic lines and does not reconstruct read dispatch calls, so these findings are not replay-reproducible.
